## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Adventures Group and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, website updates, and business performance.](https://fathom.video/share/Wx4WFzBsmw9voKTqNixUZMhFRuo_sZyX?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Overall click growth across destinations: Vallarta +14%, Cancun +9%, slight drop in Cabo](https://fathom.video/share/Wx4WFzBsmw9voKTqNixUZMhFRuo_sZyX?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
  - [New content strategy: Launching "What to Pack" articles for each month, refreshing holiday content](https://fathom.video/share/Wx4WFzBsmw9voKTqNixUZMhFRuo_sZyX?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)
  - [Website updates: New categories for Majahuitas Beach Party and Rhythms of the Night, Shows and Sunset category likely to be removed](https://fathom.video/share/Wx4WFzBsmw9voKTqNixUZMhFRuo_sZyX?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)
  - [Business performance: Vallarta +1%, Cancun -10%, Cabo +6% in September vs. last year](https://fathom.video/share/Wx4WFzBsmw9voKTqNixUZMhFRuo_sZyX?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance and Strategy

  - [Click growth across destinations, with Vallarta seeing 14% week-over-week increase](https://fathom.video/share/Wx4WFzBsmw9voKTqNixUZMhFRuo_sZyX?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
  - [New "Mexico vacation destinations" article in Vallarta performing well](https://fathom.video/share/Wx4WFzBsmw9voKTqNixUZMhFRuo_sZyX?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
  - [Launching series of articles for La Ventana, including Swimming with Orcas and Mobula Ray experiences](https://fathom.video/share/Wx4WFzBsmw9voKTqNixUZMhFRuo_sZyX?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)
  - [Creating "What to Pack" and "What to Do" articles for each month through February 2026](https://fathom.video/share/Wx4WFzBsmw9voKTqNixUZMhFRuo_sZyX?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)
  - [Refreshing Christmas and New Year's content, including updated experiences for 2025](https://fathom.video/share/Wx4WFzBsmw9voKTqNixUZMhFRuo_sZyX?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)

### Website Structure Changes

  - [New Year's Eve category added to the website](https://fathom.video/share/Wx4WFzBsmw9voKTqNixUZMhFRuo_sZyX?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Shows and Sunset category likely to be removed](https://fathom.video/share/Wx4WFzBsmw9voKTqNixUZMhFRuo_sZyX?tab=summary&timestamp=1288.0)
  - [New categories for Majahuitas Beach Party and Rhythms of the Night](https://fathom.video/share/Wx4WFzBsmw9voKTqNixUZMhFRuo_sZyX?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)
  - [Majahuitas events (except Dec 31) to be handled by Ticket Ferry platform](https://fathom.video/share/Wx4WFzBsmw9voKTqNixUZMhFRuo_sZyX?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)
  - [Sunset Sailing may be moved to Beach and Snorkeling category](https://fathom.video/share/Wx4WFzBsmw9voKTqNixUZMhFRuo_sZyX?tab=summary&timestamp=1422.0)

### Business Performance Update

  - [Vallarta: 1% up in passengers vs. last year](https://fathom.video/share/Wx4WFzBsmw9voKTqNixUZMhFRuo_sZyX?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)
  - [Cancun: 10% down (30 passengers) in September](https://fathom.video/share/Wx4WFzBsmw9voKTqNixUZMhFRuo_sZyX?tab=summary&timestamp=1213.0)
  - [Cabo: 6% up, showing positive growth](https://fathom.video/share/Wx4WFzBsmw9voKTqNixUZMhFRuo_sZyX?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)

### Seasonal Considerations

  - [Cultural activities promotion in Cancun to resume in October/November](https://fathom.video/share/Wx4WFzBsmw9voKTqNixUZMhFRuo_sZyX?tab=summary&timestamp=1494.0)
  - [Best weather for cultural tours: October to February/March](https://fathom.video/share/Wx4WFzBsmw9voKTqNixUZMhFRuo_sZyX?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [New regulations for swimming with Orcas (20-meter distance, no engines)](https://fathom.video/share/Wx4WFzBsmw9voKTqNixUZMhFRuo_sZyX?tab=summary&timestamp=1552.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Refresh and update New Year's articles with 2025 experiences](https://fathom.video/share/Wx4WFzBsmw9voKTqNixUZMhFRuo_sZyX?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)
  - [Add blog summary column to content tracking sheet](https://fathom.video/share/Wx4WFzBsmw9voKTqNixUZMhFRuo_sZyX?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)
  - [Implement changes to Shows and Sunset category, creating new landing pages for Majahuitas and Rhythms of the Night](https://fathom.video/share/Wx4WFzBsmw9voKTqNixUZMhFRuo_sZyX?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)
  - [Continue monitoring performance of new content, especially La Ventana articles](https://fathom.video/share/Wx4WFzBsmw9voKTqNixUZMhFRuo_sZyX?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)
  - [Prepare for increased promotion of cultural activities in Cancun starting October/November](https://fathom.video/share/Wx4WFzBsmw9voKTqNixUZMhFRuo_sZyX?tab=summary&timestamp=1494.0)
